# services.bitcoind

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.bitcoind`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.bitcoind` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Specification of one or more bitcoind instances. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | The configuration file path to supply bitcoind. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The data directory for bitcoind. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.dbCache` | `null or integer between 4 and 16384 (both inclusive)` | Override the default database cache size in MiB. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bitcoin daemon. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.extraCmdlineOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options to pass to bitcoind. Run bitcoind --help to list all available options. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional configurations to be appended to {file}`bitcoin.conf`. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.group` | `string` | The group as which to run bitcoind. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.package` | `package` | The bitcoind package to use. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.pidFile` | `absolute path` | Location of bitcoind pid file. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Override the default port on which to listen for connections. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.prune` | `null or ((unsigned integer, meaning >=0) or (one of "disable", "manual") convertible to it)` | Reduce storage requirements by enabling pruning (deleting) of old blocks. This allows the pruneblockchain RPC to be called to delete specific blocks, and enables automatic pruning of old blocks if a target size in MiB is provided. This mode is incompatible with -txindex and -rescan. Warning: Reverting this setting requires re-downloading the entire blockchain. ("disable" = disable pruning blocks, "manual" = allow manual pruning via RPC, >=550 = automatically prune block files to stay under the specified target size in MiB). |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.rpc.port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Override the default port on which to listen for JSON-RPC connections. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.rpc.users` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | RPC user information for JSON-RPC connections. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.rpc.users.<name>.name` | `string` | Username for JSON-RPC connections. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.rpc.users.<name>.passwordHMAC` | `string matching the pattern [0-9a-f]+\$[0-9a-f]{64}` | Password HMAC-SHA-256 for JSON-RPC connections. Must be a string of the format \<SALT-HEX>$\<HMAC-HEX>. Tool (Python script) for HMAC generation is available here: <https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/share/rpcauth/rpcauth.py> |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.testnet` | `boolean` | Whether to use the testnet instead of mainnet. |
| `services.bitcoind.<name>.user` | `string` | The user as which to run bitcoind. |
